title: a command request
body:
### Feature request description

Have you considered using the restart parameter of the run command as the privilege of the root user? I think this is very simple and can greatly simplify the learning difficulty of docker users.

### Suggest potential solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

comments.body: It is not clear what you are asking for? Can you please describe in detail what you want?
